title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: 389-ds-base bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for 389-ds-base is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for IBM z Systems

fixes.description: Rebase 389-ds-base to 3.1.x
ipa-backup failed with error : 'No such file or directory: '/usr/sbin/dsctl'
ns-slapd crashes in referral mode
ns-slapd crash in dbmdb_import_prepare_worker_entry()
Incomplete messages about replication in the errors log.
dbscan  on replication changelog does not display MOD_TYPE
dsidm: issue when renaming users
DSIDM: Re-enabling user accounts that reached inactivity limit fails with error
dsconf backend replication monitor fails if replica id starts with 0
dsconf  utility  should let you configure the "uniqueness-exclude-subtrees" parameter of the Attribute Uniqueness plug-in
Crash in __strlen_sse2 when using the nsRole filter rewriter.
Password modify extended operation should skip password policy checks when executed by root DN
Unify how group description can be added to a new group in WebUI and CLU
Increased memory consumption caused by NDN cache
[RFE] Implement "list-dn" option for dsidm tool in Directory Server
dsidm Error: float() argument must be a string or a number, not 'NoneType'
Monitoring tab should use dsconf monitor
Json option does not work with "dsidm account get-by-dn" command
[RFE] Structured (JSON) logging option for RHDS access and error logs
RHDS hangs when having online backup running together with automember_rebuild task executing
mdb database statistics don't work
Cannot create a nested role using "dsidm role create-nested"
Cannot create a filtered role using "dsidm role create-filtered"
RootDN Access Control Plugin with wildcards for IP addresses fails with an error "Invalid IP address"
dsidm failing with error "argument must be a string or a number"
Dsidm get_dn option fails for organizational unit, service and posixgroup
Dsidm uniquegroup members option does not work
dsidm role rename-by-dn does not rename a role
dsidm role subtree-status doesn't work
dsidm role get-by-dn doesn't work properly with -j option
Deleting a role with dsidm results in proper deletion message, but role is still present
dscontainer: support loading custom schema
segfault at 7ff2370010c8 ip 00007ff2339ba239 sp 00007fed321fe100 error 6 in liblmdb.so.0.0.0
Nested group does not receive memberOf attribute
ns-slapd[xxxx]: segfault at 10d7d0d0 ip 00007ff734050cdb sp 00007ff6de9f1430 error 6 in libslapd.so.0.1.0[7ff733ec0000+1b3000]
Improve  error message when bulk import connection is closed

On RHDS 12.6 The user password policy for a user was created, but the pwdpolicysubentry attribute for this user incorrectly points to the People OU password policy instead of the specific user policy.
Failure to get Server monitoring data when NDN cache is disabled.
ns-slapd crashed when we add nsslapd-referral
AddressSanitizer: leak in do_search
The numSubordinates value is not matching the number of direct children.
Statistics about index lookup report a wrong duration
Crash if repl keep alive entry can not be created
Exception thrown by dsconf instance repl get_ruv
AddressSanitizer: memory leak in memberof_add_memberof_attr

full_text:
An update for 389-ds-base is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
